translation: From the Kaniya colony to the Aqil colony: The colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before the plenary assembly. We gave our testimony before the plenary assembly.
In the letter to the City. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before the plenary assembly.

Say to the sons of <gap> and to the sons of <gap> Iddin-ilī; and to the men of <gap> the men of <gap> the men of <gap> the men of <gap> the men of <gap> the men of <gap> the men of <gap> the men of <gap>""
My dear brothers, I have written to the Kanesh colony and to the Wahbarātum. Give me the silver and the interest on the debt of the merchant. Witnessed by Awilum.
